assumptions.induced_gravity_model: Sakharov/Adler-Zee order-of-magnitude with explicit UV cutoff and species count.
assumptions.mu_running_not_time_variation: Any mu->t mapping is an external assumption (scale setting / background / screening).

induced_gravity_sanity.conclusion: Under the stated assumptions, SM/QCD-scale cutoff is far too small to reproduce observed Planck scale.

interpretation: Supporting sanity-check bundle for reviewer triage; not a standalone unification claim.

kill_test_matrix.model_conditionality_note: Combined precision bounds are apples-vs-oranges without an explicit coupling model across probes.

rows.applies_if: epsilon induces composition-dependent fifth force without screening at lab scales
rows.notes: Any unscreened O(1e-6+) composition dependence is excluded.

rows.applies_if: epsilon_em mapped to physical d(alpha)/dt in local environment
same epsilon_em applies at geologic lookback with no screening
rows.notes: Model-dependent mapping from epsilon to alpha variation is required.
Unscreened local G variation is tightly bounded.

rows.applies_if: epsilon modifies early-time expansion/recombination without compensating sector model
rows.notes: Requires explicit coupling model before any combined statement.

rows.applies_if: single coupling model links all probes consistently
rows.notes: Apples-vs-oranges otherwise; combined bounds are model-conditional.

rows.applies_if: epsilon treated strictly as measurement-model parameterization (no physical constant drift claim)
rows.notes: Within current roadmap framing this remains a valid working interpretation.

mu_running_vs_time_variation_memo: RG running is defined against renormalization scale mu, not cosmological time t.
A mu->t mapping requires extra assumptions: scale-setting rule, background dynamics, and screening/environment model.
Therefore beta-function evidence alone is insufficient to claim observable temporal drift.
non_claims: No claim that gravity equals the strong force.
No claim that QCD alone explains M_Pl.
No claim that RG beta-functions imply cosmic time variation.
This artifact is an idea-bank plus kill-test sanity scaffold only.

qcd_vacuum_scaling.conclusion: Naive scaling typically overshoots observed dark-energy density and needs model-dependent suppression.

trace_anomaly_sector_table.comment: Landau-like growth in UV for abelian coupling.
Asymptotically free trend in this convention.
Asymptotic freedom; does not imply cosmological time-variation.
